overall.description: A static, atmospheric shot of a foggy mountain lake at night with heavy teal color grading. The scene features silhouetted trees along the left shoreline, mist-covered water, and distant mountains barely visible through dense fog, creating a mysterious and isolated mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty mountain lake shoreline at night

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the foggy lake landscape with no movement or interaction

entered.detail: Dark dense trees forming a solid black silhouette against the foggy background along the left shore
Calm water surface covered in dense fog, reflecting the teal ambient light
Dark mountain slopes rising in the background, partially obscured by thick mist
Dense atmospheric fog hanging over the water and filling the valley between mountains
Dark rock formation visible through the mist on the right side of the lake

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a foggy mountain lake at night. Dense silhouetted trees line the left shore while mist hangs heavy over the dark water. Mountains loom barely visible in the background through the thick fog, with a rocky outcrop on the right. The scene is bathed in cool teal light with no movement or activity throughout the duration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric gaze over a foggy mountain lake at night, preserving a mood of absolute stillness and isolation. It begins with a view of dense silhouetted trees lining the left shore, while heavy mist clings to the surface of the dark water. As the eye wanders across the landscape, the scene reveals distant mountains barely visible through the thick fog and a rocky outcrop on the right. The entire environment remains bathed in a cool teal light, with no movement or activity shifting the composition.
